shots.caption: A FROG CAN FREEZE SOLID
shots.prompt: premium natural history documentary image-to-video from the exact wood frog source photo. Preserve the real wood frog anatomy, leaf litter, wet skin texture, and camera framing. Add true subtle in-frame motion: cold air shimmer, tiny frost sparkle forming along leaves and frog edges, barely perceptible breathing fading toward frozen stillness. No text, no labels, no arrows, no UI, no scene cut, no morphing, no melting, no new animal.
